using UnityEditor;
using UnityEngine;

namespace RLMovie.Editor
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Builds the V2 starter scene for __SCENARIO_NAME__ after the generated files compile.
    /// </summary>
    public static class __SCENARIO_NAME__SceneBuilder
    {
        [MenuItem("RLMovie/Create __SCENARIO_NAME__ Scene")]
        public static void CreateScene()
        {
            CreateSceneSilently();

            EditorUtility.DisplayDialog(
                "__SCENARIO_NAME__ Scene",
                "V2 starter scene created.\n\nNext step:\nCustomize the archetype-specific scene logic while keeping the shared blueprint and backbone intact.",
                "OK");
        }

        public static string CreateSceneSilently()
        {
            CoreScenarioStarterDefinition.CreateStarterScene<RLMovie.Environments.__SCENARIO_NAME__.__AGENT_CLASS__>(
                "__SCENE_PATH__",
                "__BEHAVIOR_NAME__",
                13,
                2,
                (context, agent) =>
                {
                    var agentSo = new SerializedObject(agent);
                    agentSo.FindProperty("primaryTarget").objectReferenceValue = context.PrimaryTarget;
                    agentSo.FindProperty("environmentManager").objectReferenceValue = context.EnvironmentManager;
                    agentSo.FindProperty("moveForce").floatValue = 1.0f;
                    agentSo.FindProperty("interactionRadius").floatValue = 1.35f;
                    agentSo.FindProperty("startPosition").vector3Value = new Vector3(0f, 1.0f, 0f);
                    agentSo.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                });

            Debug.Log("Created the V2 starter scene for __SCENARIO_NAME__ at __SCENE_PATH__");
            return "__SCENE_PATH__";
        }
    }
}
